owned_files.notes: 3 tutorial quests: first_habitat, farming_basics, power_grid. Solid onboarding spine. Uses Build/Harvest/Gather/Craft objectives with prerequisite chaining.
2 advanced farming quests (greenhouse, automation). Chains off tutorial_farming_basics.
2 construction quests (advanced_habitat, multi_level). Chains off tutorial_first_habitat.
2 exploration quests (first_survey, distant_lands) using Travel + Gather objectives.

gaps: Only 9 quests total across 4 chains — minimal content

No Humanity Accord or AI-onboarding tutorials referenced in CLAUDE.md
No quest chains for chemistry, electronics, mining, trading, cooking, medical

summary: Scope is correctly flagged active — only a scaffold of 9 quests covers four chains. Major missing surfaces include civic/governance onboarding and skill progression past tutorials. High-leverage area for content authoring.
